description_long: This is a vintage-style record player with a rectangular wooden base and a matching external speaker. The front panel features three round control knobs, a power button, and a display with Cyrillic text, suggesting a Russian origin. The turntable platter is topped with a vinyl record, and the tonearm is positioned over the record, ready for playback. The speaker has a textured black grille and a wooden frame, connected to the main unit by a visible cable. The surface of the record player is slightly worn, with a portrait decal on the side, adding a touch of character and age. The overall design is robust, with a mix of metal, plastic, and wood materials, evoking a classic, retro aesthetic.
description: A vintage wooden record player with a vinyl record, control knobs, and a matching external speaker with a black grille. The unit features a worn finish and a portrait decal, exuding a retro, well-used charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with three knobs, a power button, display with Cyrillic text, and the vinyl record on the platter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the portrait decal on the wooden base and the cable connecting the speaker to the main unit.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the speaker, showing its solid wooden construction and the cable trailing out.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the tonearm over the record and the textured black speaker grille.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and circular, occupying a central position on the wooden base. It is topped with a vinyl record, which is black with a red label. The platter appears to be made of metal or plastic, with a slightly matte finish and subtle grooves visible on the record surface.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and straight with a black finish. It is of medium length, extending from the right side of the base and positioned over the record, suggesting it is ready for playback. The tonearm has visible joints and a cartridge at the end.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is attached to the end of the tonearm, appearing as a small, pointed component. It is metallic with a fine tip, designed to contact the grooves of the vinyl record.
attribute_control_knobs: There are three round control knobs on the front panel, made of black plastic with a textured grip. They are accompanied by a power button and a display with Cyrillic text. The knobs are evenly spaced and have a classic, retro design.
